articles.title: Jet Fuel Crisis Grounds Flights: What Travelers Need to Know
articles.summary: Airlines are canceling thousands of flights as jet fuel prices soar. Summer travel plans could be disrupted. Know your rights: U.S. law guarantees a refund, and EU rules offer extra protections.

articles.title: Trump Scraps Pakistan Peace Talks Minutes After Iran's Foreign Minister Departs
articles.summary: Trump canceled his envoys' trip to Pakistan for Iran talks just after Iran's foreign minister left. He says phone calls are better. The ceasefire with Iran is shaky, and fighting continues in Lebanon.

articles.title: Trump Attends White House Press Dinner for First Time as President—No Comedian, No Roast
articles.summary: Trump finally attended the White House Correspondents' Dinner after skipping it five times. The event had no comedian, and journalist groups urged a strong message on press freedom. Trump's last visit was in 2011, when Obama roasted him.
